{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230155364BC26CB0F453A9F21D03"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7536580870490424089","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么说呢，完全不同于我看过的异世界转生文，作者文笔虽然好，但故事感觉看起来就是怪怪的，但非常值得看，书荒了就来看一眼","text_exts":[{"e":17,"s":14,"text":"异世界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%82%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774202136A9F21D03%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227536580870490424089%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227449335835461159961%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%82%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754751105,"group_id":"7449335835461159961","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4VU5PTra5HYfIhpHN4KcXxOJMckUK16SUQsnM9WScu0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"1050761031846595","user_name":"篷州的星辰鹰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1050761031846595","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7449335835461159961","book_info":{"abstract":"转生+异世界+西幻日常+枪械碾压
因一件意外事故不幸丧生的青年凌霄宫，侥幸被神选中获得了转生到异世界的机会。
并且还根据他的要求赋予了他三种特殊的力量。
最强的武器可以随意变换形态的枪，创造任意子弹的技能，以及能够看穿一切的魔眼。
属于他的传奇人生就此拉开序幕！
